title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Straw Hat Pirates, Law, Big Mom, Unknown person #14, Kid as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like we could hear his voice even though we're under water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's worry about that later... we've got to save him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let's run straight to the stage, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: It's good to hear straw hat's okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was over the moment he fell into the sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've been collaborating for a while now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But honestly, when it comes to him... I've learned to never say never.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you come to get in my way?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you think we should play nice for now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Bond has chained me for too long...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 28 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
